summary: Iteration 42: Verified bug fixes for transaction and transaction request creation. All backend tests passed (8/8). The /api/transaction-requests/pending-count endpoint now returns 200 with count (was 404 before fix due to route ordering). Transaction creation via FormData works correctly. Deposit TX requests auto-process, withdrawal TX requests stay pending. Duplicate detection returns informative error messages. Frontend forms render correctly with all fields.

issues: Console warning: span cannot be child of select/option - hydration error warning (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Transaction creation (deposit to PSP) via FormData succeeds
Transaction Request (deposit) auto-processes and creates transaction
Transaction Request (withdrawal) stays pending as expected
Duplicate detection blocks same client+type+amount+destination within 5 minutes with informative error
Validation errors return proper array format with field-specific messages
Transaction requests list endpoint returns paginated results
Frontend Transactions Summary page loads and shows Create Transaction dialog
Frontend TX Requests page loads and shows New Transaction Request dialog
Sidebar badge shows pending TX requests count
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering fix verified: /transaction-requests/pending-count (line 8145) is now BEFORE /{request_id} wildcard (line 8150)
Frontend error handling in Transactions.js (lines 564-580) properly formats array validation errors
Frontend error handling in TransactionRequests.js (lines 565-578) properly formats array validation errors
Layout.js (line 93) correctly fetches /api/transaction-requests/pending-count for sidebar badge
seed_data_creation: Created test transactions and transaction requests during testing (auto-cleaned by unique amounts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transaction and TX Request creation bugs have been fixed. Route ordering issue resolved - pending-count endpoint now works. FormData submission works for both transactions and transaction requests. Deposit requests auto-process, withdrawal requests stay pending. Duplicate detection works with 5-minute window. Frontend forms render correctly.
